# PCSX-Redux OpenBIOS

These are the standard and fast-boot OpenBIOS ROM images used by the browser
build. OpenBIOS is a redistributable PlayStation BIOS replacement from the
[PCSX-Redux project](https://github.com/grumpycoders/pcsx-redux/tree/main/src/mips/openbios).

- Source revision: `f22e4c122cd8d2e84dc6d2782de3def75d0014ff`
- Upstream CI build: `20260713.10` (Azure build `24735`)
- `openbios.bin` SHA-256: `98a7e6085df7bff958c28769b568c0dcee3846864e0021d5dcca3db086547249`
- `openbios-fastboot.bin` SHA-256: `983bd64bf41863b749086daab2f734a74e69b9895e3066a382dfaa1570806c6d`

The unmodified corresponding source is available at the pinned revision above.
Both binaries are distributed under the included MIT license.
